scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @dashboarduz/shared && npm run build --workspace @dashboarduz/db && npm run build --workspace @dashboarduz/api && npm run build --workspace @dashboarduz/web
scripts.type-check: npm run build --workspace @dashboarduz/shared && npm run build --workspace @dashboarduz/db && npm run type-check --workspace @dashboarduz/api && npm run type-check --workspace @dashboarduz/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @dashboarduz/api && npm run lint --workspace @dashboarduz/web
